data.title: Mister Car Wash's Q4 2025: Net revenues up 4% to $261.2M, UWC memberships rise 7%, opened 16 new locations. Full year: Net revenues increased 6% to $1.05B, net income $103.1M, adjusted EBITDA up 8% to $345.4M.
data.description: Mister Car Wash, Inc. reported its financial results for the quarter and year ended December 31, 2025. In the fourth quarter, net revenues increased by 4% to $261.2 million, comparable-store sales grew by 1.6%, and UWC memberships rose by 7% to nearly 2.3 million. They also opened 16 new locations. For the full year, net revenues increased by 6% to $1.05 billion, comparable-store sales increased by 2.9%, and they opened 29 new locations. Adjusted net income for the year was $145.0 million, and adjusted EBITDA increased by 8% to $345.4 million. As of December 31, 2025, Mister Car Wash operates approximately 550 locations with a car wash subscription program in North America.

data.title: Garmin reports record Q4 revenue of $2.12 billion, 17% YoY increase. FY 2025 revenue hits $7.25 billion, 18% increase. Dividend up 17%, $500M share repurchase program announced. Exec cites strong performance and strategic focus for growth. Webcast information provided.
data.description: Garmin Ltd. reported record revenue and profit for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. In the fourth quarter, they achieved consolidated revenue of $2.12 billion, a 17% increase from the previous year. This growth was seen across all segments, with operating income reaching $614 million, a 19% increase. For the fiscal year 2025, they attained a record revenue of $7.25 billion, a 15% increase from the prior year. They shipped over 20 million units and achieved a record operating income of $1.88 billion. The company also proposed a 17% dividend increase and announced a new $500 million share repurchase program. They expect full-year 2026 revenue of $7.9 billion with a pro forma EPS of $9.35. Additionally, the Board of Directors proposed a cash dividend of $4.20 per share and a new share repurchase program, replacing the previous one. Total operating expenses in the fourth quarter were $644 million, with operating cash flow of $554 million and free cash flow of $430 million. The effective tax rate was 16.8%, and they ended the quarter with cash and securities of approximately $4.1 billion. The company showcased strong performance and growth trajectory with strategic focus and market diversification.

data.title: BNCCORP, INC. reports Q4 net income of $2.2 million, EPS $0.62, an increase from 2024. Loans grew to $738.7M, net interest margin 3.64%, allowance for credit losses increased to 1.40%, with a strong capital position.
data.description: BNCCORP, INC. reported a net income of $2.2 million in Q4 2025, down from $2.3 million in Q4 2024. Pre-Provision, Pre-tax operating income was $3.9 million, up 25.8%. Net Interest Income rose by 13.4% to $9.0 million. The provision for credit losses was $1.1 million in Q4 2025, up from $280,000 in Q4 2024. Return on average assets increased to 0.89% in 2025, and return on average equity rose to 8.13%. Loans held for investment increased to $738.7 million. Net interest margin was 3.64%. Tangible book value per common share was $30.26. Trust assets under administration increased to $480.9 million. Total assets stood at $1.1 billion at the end of 2025. Total deposits increased to $971.8 million. The Company's tangible common equity capital ratio was 9.68%. The company reported financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025, showing growth in net interest income, improved operating efficiency, and increased return on assets and equity.

data.title: OGE Energy Corp. reported earnings of $2.32 per diluted share in 2025, up from $2.19/share in 2024. Forward-looking guidance predicts consolidated earnings per share growth rate of 5-7%.
data.description: OGE Energy Corp, the parent company of Oklahoma Gas and Electric (OG&E), reported earnings of $2.32 per diluted share in 2025, up from $2.19 in 2024. OG&E contributed earnings of $2.47 per diluted share in 2025, up from $2.33 in 2024, while other operations had a loss of $0.15 per diluted share in 2025, compared to a loss of $0.14 in 2024. For 2025, OG&E's net income was $499.8 million, other operations had a loss of $29.1 million, and OGE Energy's net income was $470.7 million. In Q4 2025, OGE Energy reported net income of $69.2 million, OG&E had net income of $78.2 million, and other operations reported a loss of $9.0 million. The 2026 consolidated earnings guidance for OGE Energy is $2.43 per average diluted share, with OG&E expected to earn $2.57 and other operations to have a loss of $0.14 per average diluted share. OGE Energy plans to grow consolidated earnings per share by 5-7% annually through 2028. A dividend of $0.425 per share was declared for Q2 2026. The full financial report is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: KP Tissue and Kruger Products report revenue increases, with Kruger Products' Q4 2025 revenue at $560.1 million (up 3.8%), full year 2025 revenue at $2,203.4 million (up 7.5%). Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 2025 was $84.2 million (up 26.0%) and for full year 2025 was $318.2 million (up 20.2%). Net income for Q4 2025 was $23.4 million (compared to a net loss of $13.7 million in Q4 2024), and for full year 2025 was $75.5 million (compared to $23.8 million in 2024). The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.18 per share to be paid on April 15, 2026. Further growth expected in 2026 and beyond. The news article discusses financial results, dividend declaration, and forecasts.
data.description: KP Tissue Inc. reports financial results for Q4 2025 and full year 2025 of Kruger Products Inc., showing revenue growth and profitability improvement. Kruger Products recorded revenue of $560.1 million in Q4 2025, up 3.8% from Q4 2024, with Adjusted EBITDA of $84.2 million, a 26% increase. Net income was $23.4 million in Q4 2025 compared to a net loss of $13.7 million in Q4 2024. For the full year 2025, revenue was $2,203.4 million, up 7.5% from 2024, with Adjusted EBITDA of $318.2 million, a 20.2% increase, and net income of $75.5 million compared to $23.8 million in 2024. Kruger Products issued $165 million in Senior Unsecured Notes in December 2025 and announced plans to open a new facility in the US in 2028. KPT also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.18 per share. The outlook for Q1 2026 projects Adjusted EBITDA to be in line with Q4 2025. Additional details can be found in the financial statements and press release on SEDAR and the company's website.

data.title: NewAmsterdam Pharma reports $728.9M in cash at year-end 2025, advancing oral therapies for cardiovascular disease patients.
data.description: NewAmsterdam Pharma Company N.V. announced its financial results for the full year ended December 31, 2025, revealing $728.9 million in cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities. The company anticipates approval decisions from the EMA, UK, and Switzerland regulators regarding obicetrapib and a fixed-dose combination in the second half of 2026. Additionally, they are expecting to release topline data from the RUBENS Phase 3 trial for patients with type 2 diabetes and metabolic syndrome by year-end 2026. NewAmsterdam is focusing on developing obicetrapib, an oral medicine for cardiovascular disease patients. They are actively engaged in three ongoing Phase 3 trials, with significant financial strength to fund operations. The company also has planned milestones, including initiating a clinical trial evaluating obicetrapib in early Alzheimer's disease. The financial results showed $22.5 million in revenue, $203.8 million net loss, and various research and development expenses. NewAmsterdam aims to provide a safe, effective, and convenient LDL-lowering therapy for patients at risk of CVD.

data.description: In Atlanta, Global Payments Inc. (NYSE: GPN) revealed their financial results for the quarter and year ending December 31, 2025.

data.title: Lumen Technologies (NYSE: LUMN) to host Investor Day on Feb. 25, 2026 in Denver, starting at 8:30 am ET with presentations lasting until around 12 pm ET. Leadership to discuss transformation strategy for growth.
data.description: Lumen Technologies (NYSE: LUMN) is scheduled to conduct an Investor Day on Wednesday, Feb. 25, 2026. The event will commence at 8:30 a.m. ET and is set to end by 12 p.m. ET. The focus of the presentations during this session will revolve around Lumen’s future transformation plans. This will encompass discussions on the company's commercial engine, product pipeline, financial structure, and a multi-year growth strategy aimed at enhancing earnings and long-term value creation.

data.title: Immunocore will report Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2026. Aims to improve outcomes for patients.
data.description: Immunocore Holdings plc (NASDAQ: IMCR) is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 25, 2026. The company, based in OXFORDSHIRE, England, RADNOR, Penn., and GAITHERSBURG, Md., US, focuses on developing groundbreaking immunomodulating drugs to revolutionize patient outcomes in cancer, infectious diseases, and autoimmune disorders. Following the release of the financial report, Immunocore will conduct a live call for investors and stakeholders. For more details, refer to the Benzinga.com website.

data.title: Tradr ETFs to launch first-to-market leveraged ETFs on CLSK, COHR, and LEU. Sophisticated investors and traders targeted.
data.description: Tradr ETFs, a leading provider of ETFs catering to experienced investors and professional traders, has revealed plans to introduce three groundbreaking strategies that will offer early access to high-growth stocks. This move positions Tradr ETFs as a pioneer in the market, emphasizing innovation and a forward-thinking approach. The company anticipates unveiling these unique single stock leveraged opportunities to the investing community amid a rapidly evolving financial landscape.

data.title: CenCore secures $44 million contract from Department of War to develop modular buildings with NIWC Atlantic.
data.description: CenCore, a company based in SPRINGVILLE, Utah, has joined forces with the Naval Information Warfare Center Atlantic (NIWC Atlantic) to enhance the Defense Industrial Base (DIB). Through a collaboration with the Department of War (DOW), CenCore has been awarded a substantial $44 million contract for this initiative.

data.title: Taltz and Zepbound combo in Phase 3b trial shows superior efficacy for psoriasis patients with obesity or overweight.
data.description: Results from the TOGETHER-PsO study at 36 weeks showed that the combination of Taltz and Zepbound met the primary endpoint by demonstrating superiority over Taltz monotherapy in achieving complete skin clearance (PASI 100) and at least 10% weight loss. In a significant secondary endpoint, patients receiving Taltz and Zepbound were 40% more likely to achieve...

data.title: MakeMyTrip collaborates with OpenAI to enhance AI capabilities, aiming to improve travel discovery with over 50,000 conversations daily.
data.description: MakeMyTrip Limited announced a collaboration with OpenAI to enhance its AI capabilities for travel discovery. The integration of OpenAI's APIs into its app will facilitate seamless transition from inspiration to booking for users. MakeMyTrip's Myra interface handles over 50,000 conversations daily in multiple languages, catering to a large user base, especially in Tier-2 and smaller cities. This move aims to improve user engagement and strengthen the company's position in the travel industry. The initiative aligns with MakeMyTrip's growth strategy by leveraging AI to streamline travel planning and boost customer engagement. The stock (NASDAQ: MMYT) is currently facing a bearish trend.

data.title: Sonic Automotive beats Q4 earnings with EPS of $1.52 (above estimate of $1.51), revenue down $24.70M vs last year.
data.description: Sonic Automotive (NYSE: SAH) released its fourth-quarter earnings on February 18, 2026, at 06:45 AM. The earnings report revealed that Sonic Automotive surpassed estimated earnings by 0.66%, with an EPS of $1.52 compared to the expected $1.51. However, revenue experienced a decline of $24.70 million from the corresponding period in the previous year. In the previous quarter, the company fell short on EPS. For a detailed analysis, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: OneSpaWorld Hldgs (NASDAQ: OSW) posted Q4 earnings: EPS $0.24 (missed estimate by -4.0%), revenue increased by $24.89M.
data.description: OneSpaWorld Holdings, trading on NASDAQ under OSW, released its Q4 earnings report on February 18, 2026, at 06:45 AM. The company fell short of estimated earnings by -4.0%, with an EPS of $0.24 compared to an expected $0.25. Revenue saw an increase of $24.89 million from the previous year. data.title: Merck and Mayo Clinic partner for AI drug discovery, precision medicine research agreement.
data.description: Merck and Mayo Clinic have partnered in a Research and Development agreement based in Rahway, New Jersey, and Rochester, Minnesota. The collaboration aims to utilize artificial intelligence (AI), advanced analytics, and data to enhance drug discovery processes.

data.title: HF Sinclair partners with UPOP Holdings to form Green Trail Fuels, adding 30 retail sites in CO and NM, boosting market presence.
data.description: A company, HF Sinclair Corporation (NYSE: DINO), has introduced a new joint venture named Green Trail Fuels, LLC, with UPOP Holdings. HF Sinclair will possess a 50% non-operating economic stake in the partnership, including 30 retail locations in Colorado and New Mexico. The agreement will see HF Sinclair providing fuel from its regional refineries to enhance its branded marketing reach in the area.

data.title: Grafted Polyolefins market set to reach $5.98 billion by 2030, with various applications across industries.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets indicates significant growth in the Grafted Polyolefins Market. The market is segmented by type, including Maleic Anhydride Grafted PE, PP, and EVA, catering to various applications such as Adhesion Promotion and Compatibilization. The key industries benefiting from this market are Automotive, Packaging, and Construction. The report also covers different processing technologies involved in the market's operations. This data provides valuable insights for stakeholders looking to capitalize on these trends.
